coverage_tests.description: Class A/B Overcollateralization Test: Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount divided by the aggregate outstanding principal balance of the Class A Notes and the Class B Notes.
coverage_tests.denominator: Aggregate outstanding principal balance of Class A Notes and Class B Notes
coverage_tests.failure_action: Redirect interest proceeds to principal reinvestment account until the Class A/B OC Threshold is restored.
coverage_tests.confidence_reason: Threshold and cure explicitly stated in indenture.

coverage_tests.description: Class C Overcollateralization Test: Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount divided by the aggregate outstanding principal balance of Class A, B, and C Notes.
coverage_tests.denominator: Aggregate outstanding principal balance of Class A, B, and C Notes
coverage_tests.failure_action: Interest proceeds diverted per Section 11.1(b); principal reinvestment or pro rata paydown.
coverage_tests.confidence_reason: Threshold and cure explicitly stated in indenture.

coverage_tests.description: Class A/B Interest Coverage Test: Interest Proceeds divided by the sum of accrued interest on Class A Notes, Class B Notes, and the Senior Management Fee.
coverage_tests.numerator: Interest Proceeds received during the related Interest Accrual Period
coverage_tests.denominator: Accrued interest on Class A + Class B Notes + Senior Management Fee
coverage_tests.confidence_reason: Threshold and cure explicitly stated in indenture.

concentration_limits.calculation_basis: Percentage of Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount

concentration_limits.description: Single Moody's Industry Classification Group concentration
concentration_limits.calculation_basis: Percentage of Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount
concentration_limits.confidence_reason: Tiered limits explicitly stated in indenture.

concentration_limits.calculation_basis: Percentage of Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount; Defaulted Obligations treated as CCC/Caa-rated
Percentage of Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount
Percentage of Adjusted Collateral Principal Amount

waterfall_steps.label: Class A/B OC Test — divert if failing

diverts_to.description: Principal reinvestment account — cure Class A/B OC shortfall

diverts_to.description: Principal reinvestment account — cure Class C OC shortfall
